headline.text: L1 Sollich 3 lost a matrix screw into product at 03:20, stopped *45 minutes* to search and re-screen — screw never found, replacement installed by 05:30.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran all four Sollich lines but S3 had a rough shift. A screw fell from MM4 at 03:20 and was never recovered; the team re-screened all affected product through x-ray and installed a replacement. Earlier in the night, S3 struggled with Tunnel 1 belt tracking, MM3/MM5 sealing failures, and product quality degrading after double-processing through the matrices. S2 had temper unit alarms around 05:23 but cleared by 07:04.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 FFS ran smoothly with two blade cleanings. ML2 had a PTL water leak at 20:50 with pressure spiking to 19.3 — maintenance responded. ML3 ran clean with no issues.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Truffle line struggled all morning to dial in tempering after adjusting from 45°C down to 33°C per Chad's guidance — still working to stabilize as of 07:01. ML1 had recurring mold alarms through the night, same mold flagged multiple times for replacement. MF Matrix paused briefly for a sensor failure that caused chocolate overflow, then later had a printer issue around 06:48.

resolved.title: S3 Tunnel 1 belt tracking west, missing roller
resolved.summary: Conveyor tracking caused caramel to deposit off the cookie bed; team found a missing roller under the depositor and a drive roller installed incorrectly.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 18:01 — "Tunnel 1 is fixed and ready" after correcting roller installation (William Beattie).

resolved.title: S3 MM4 screw fell into product
resolved.summary: The screw holding the matrix arms came out at 03:20, operator stopped immediately; part never found despite 45-minute search, all MM4 product re-screened through x-ray.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance found a replacement bolt and installed by 05:20; x-ray testing showed 2 of 5 passes rejected similar part, all affected product re-screened and cleared by 06:19 (Luis Falcon, Ebrima Dibba).

resolved.title: S2 chicane belts misaligned
resolved.summary: Dakota paused the line at 17:33 to adjust the chicane belts; back running by 17:49.

resolved.title: S2 temper unit high pressure alarm and mass temp low
resolved.summary: Riser pump shut off 20 minutes after starting tempering program with high pressure alarm and mass temperature too low; needed second reheat.
resolved.resolution: Got two good tempers after reheating, started line at 07:04 (Joseph Scott).

resolved.title: FFS blade needed cleaning
resolved.summary: Line down at 10:01 for maintenance to clean the blade.

resolved.title: MF Matrix sensor failure causing chocolate overflow
resolved.summary: Line paused at 17:55 due to sensor fault that caused chocolate to overflow.
resolved.resolution: Issue addressed, line resumed normal operations (no explicit resolution message but line continued).

resolved.title: Truffle M4 belt tracking off
resolved.summary: The M4 belt moved out of position at 06:04, maintenance called in to adjust.

needs_attention.title: S3 Tunnel 1 belt tracking recurring issue
needs_attention.summary: Despite multiple fixes through the night (rollers, tension adjustments), Tunnel 1 belt continued to track west and fold over itself.
needs_attention.status: Belt adjusted and running as of 23:01 per 3rd shift operator and Luis; recurring pattern suggests deeper mechanical issue remains.

needs_attention.title: S2 MM6 pouch quality poor, bad drop every ~15 bags
needs_attention.summary: Conner held off running MM6 at 17:50 due to high pouch scrap rate — bags zipping before seal, looking into further adjustments.
needs_attention.status: Line held at 17:50 to avoid climbing scrap; Caleb and team investigating adjustments, no resolution posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 MM3 and MM5 sealing failures causing high pouch scrap
needs_attention.summary: Multiple matrices failing to seal bags throughout 2nd and 3rd shift, adding to pouch scrap and causing product to be processed twice, degrading appearance.
needs_attention.status: Caleb and Dakota investigating all three matrix machines as of 21:39; operators adjusted sealing but bags still coming out open or poorly sealed, 3 pallets on hold due to appearance issues from double-processing as of 22:12.

needs_attention.title: S3 product appearance degraded from double-processing
needs_attention.summary: Product passing through matrices twice due to sealing failures loses acceptable appearance; Angelica flagged 3 pallets on hold at 22:12.
needs_attention.status: Angelica suggested reducing tunnel temp to get colder caramel exit; William noted accumulation bins causing pieces to stick, instructed team to scrap deep bins and use shallow bins only; product on hold as of 22:21.

needs_attention.title: S3 vibrating plates dirty, product clumping in scales
needs_attention.summary: Troy observed at 07:10 that vibrating plates are very dirty and un-enrobed caramel causing product to clump, leaving empty zones and preventing pouches from filling.
needs_attention.status: Identified at shift handoff; plates need cleaning, product sticking together on vibrating surface.

needs_attention.title: ML2 water leak from PTL hose joint
needs_attention.summary: Water leaking from a PTL hose joint at 20:50, pressure was up to 19.3, some water let out via blue handle to reduce pressure.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance looking at it as of 20:50, cleaned up water; no follow-up on repair completion by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 recurring mold alarms, same mold flagging multiple times
needs_attention.summary: Mold alarms throughout 2nd and 3rd shift at 16:46, 18:46, 20:12, 21:42, 22:11; maintenance noticed same mold from earlier alarm.
needs_attention.status: Tyson marked the repeat-offending mold at 22:59 for 3rd shift operator to replace; mix of dirty pins and sensor errors; Shawn wondered if sensor position or cleanliness at fault.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line tempering unstable after adjustment
needs_attention.summary: After adjusting tempering unit from 45°C down to 33°C per Chad's instruction, line struggled all morning to stabilize; temper readings bouncing, not achieving good temper consistently.
needs_attention.status: As of 07:01 Itzel reported 2nd temper at -0.2, technically have temper but need regular water/chocolate adjustments; also noted enrober blower was left on when line not running, causing chocolate to overheat.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C3 belt tear
needs_attention.summary: Tear observed in belt C3 at 00:17.
needs_attention.status: Tear identified at 00:17, no repair status posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix printer turned off
needs_attention.summary: Printer turned off at 06:48, team checking it.
needs_attention.status: Team checking as of 06:48, no follow-up posted by window close.
